exploration_notes: Analyzed all commits from v1.39.0 through post-v1.40.1 (HEAD at 3d5a345f). The two most recent features are: (1) remote blob storage support for loading the Flipt configuration file from S3/GCS/Azure, implemented in config.go's new getConfigFile function and the refactored object/mux.go; (2) improved OpenTelemetry tracing with configurable sampling ratio, configurable propagators (via autoprop), OTel semantic conventions for feature flags on evaluation spans, and upgraded semconv from v1.4.0 to
